_comment: Canonical prompts that should auto-invoke each V5 skill. Used for FR-2.3 trigger-accuracy review. Live measurement requires running the agent; this file pins the expectations.

cases.prompt: Add a Row Level Security policy to the budgets table for owners
Set up RLS on the invoices table — service role can write, authenticated can read
Add the shadcn data-table to the dashboard
Write a Vitest unit test for the parseAmount function from this spec
Add a Vitest spec for the budget-calculator module
I found a hardcoded Stripe key in src/lib/payments.ts — fix it
Move this OPENAI_API_KEY out of the source file into env
Fix: invoice totals are off by one cent on the dashboard
Add a budgets table with user_id and amount columns to the database
Create a Supabase migration to add a status column to invoices
